name: Spit Roasted Chili Barbeque Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan or skillet over medium-high heat and cook onion until soft.
2. Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
3. Puree the tomatoes using a food mill, blender, or food processor.
4. Combine the onion mixture with all other ingredients except the meat.
5. Bring to a boil and simmer for several minutes.
6. Remove from heat and set aside.
7. Thread ribs onto the spit and secure with prongs. Close the cover two-thirds of the way.
8. Spit roast for 30 minutes, then baste every ten or so for another 40 minutes, or until juices run clear.
9. Serve ribs with several tablespoons of sauce on each plate. Makes about 4 servings.
